Quickly switch and manage recently visited browser tabs.

For quick switching and management of recently visited browser tabs, supporting major browsers like Chrome and Firefox. It helps users efficiently find, group, and restore historical tabs, enhancing the browsing experience.

快速切换和管理最近访问的浏览页签。它可以高效的帮助您快速查找、分组和恢复历史标签页，提升浏览体验。

    ♻️ Undo：Restore closed tabs  
    🚀 Opened：Quickly switch to the open tab  
    🌐 Today：Quick overview of today's visits

## Features

- Quickly switch between recently visited tabs
- Tab grouping and management
- Multi-keyword search support
- Multi-browser support (Chrome, Firefox)

Scans and cleans suspicious website notification permissions. Protects against spam and scam ads in real-time.

Are you tired of receiving fake virus alerts, click-bait advertisements, and adult content notifications on your desktop? Deceptive websites often trick you into clicking "Allow Notifications" using fake captcha prompts or urgent security warnings. Once allowed, they flood you with annoying spam popups.

NotiSpam Cleaner is a privacy-first, lightweight tool designed to scan and clean notification settings in Google Chrome, protecting you from notification abuse.

KEY FEATURES & BENEFITS
- 100% Privacy-First & Open-Source (Security & Transparency):
All scans and blocks are processed strictly on your local machine. Absolutely zero data is collected or sent off-device. As a fully open-source extension (MIT License), our code is publicly hosted on GitHub for anyone to audit and verify.
GitHub Repository: https://github.com/mah-jp/notispam-cleaner

- Scan & One-Click Clean:
Instantly audit your allowed notifications list. The extension automatically separates "Trusted" sites (like Google, Slack, Teams) from "Suspicious/Unknown" ones, letting you revoke permissions from all suspicious sites at once while keeping your trusted ones intact.

- Real-Time Guard & Silent Protection:
Actively monitors notification permission changes. When a suspicious site gets allowed, the extension detects it instantly and blocks it. Includes a "Silent Protection" mode to auto-block notifications in the background without showing any alerts—ideal for family members' PCs.

HOW TO USE IT
1. Click the NotiSpam Cleaner icon in your toolbar.
2. Click "Scan Allowed Sites" to analyze notification permissions.
3. Review "Suspicious / Unknown" sites and click "Clean All Suspicious Sites" to block them.
4. Keep the "Real-time Guard" toggle active to get alert popups if you accidentally allow a suspicious site in the future.

IMPORTANT NOTES & LIMITATIONS
- Not an Adblocker: This extension specifically blocks annoying popups generated through Chrome's native push notifications. It is not designed to block general web page advertisements (like banners or video ads).
- Technical Limitation: Due to Chrome security constraints, extensions cannot retrieve a bulk list of all custom notification settings. NotiSpam Cleaner discovers sites by cross-referencing allowed rules with your local history, bookmarks, and open tabs. Very old allowed sites that are no longer in your history or bookmarks may not be scanned. You can view the full raw database link inside the extension to review all rules manually.

ScriptScratch is a versatile extension for analyzing your internet habits, creating interactive charts, and managing personal notes and books. It's designed for ease of use and high efficiency, enriching your digital experience while keeping you organized.

Chrome Extension to add vim keybindings and New Tab commands

CommandCenter is a utility for adding the following functionality:

- "Fuzzy search" that uses fzf that is more forgiving and uses substring search
- CommandCenter: list of commands, bookmarks, current and recently closed tabs
- TabCenter: allows you to search, jump to, close and reopen tabs
- Keybindings to open both of these on any page, not just New Tab
- Utility "Site Scripts" injected into configured webpages
- Vim-style keybindings to every webpage

A seamless way to stay connected and notified about your favorite manhwa and friends’ lists

Never lose track of where you left off. ManhwaSync automatically detects when you're reading manhwa and saves your progress — no manual entry needed. It works across popular sites, if you find a site where the extension is not working on report it directly inside the popup.

Automatic Tracking
Visit any supported manhwa site and ManhwaSync picks up the series and chapter you're on. Your library builds itself as you read.

Chapter Notifications
Set alerts for your favorite series and get notified the moment a new chapter drops. You can also set alerts for a specific chapter number if you're waiting for a series to stack up.

Your Library, Your Way
Organize your reading list with drag-and-drop reordering, search through your collection, and see at a glance which series have new chapters waiting for you.

Read With Friends
Add friends, browse their reading lists, and discover new series through what they're following. Stay connected with readers who share your taste.

Privacy When You Need It
Workplace mode keeps your reading activity out of your browser history. Blacklist specific sites if you don't want them tracked.

Built-in Feedback
Found a bug or have an idea? Submit reports directly from the extension and get replies from the development team.

ManhwaSync is free, lightweight, and respects your privacy. Install it and let your library build itself.
Spotlight-style launcher for browser history, bookmarks, and open tabs

Xun (寻) is a fast, keyboard-driven launcher that lets you jump to anything in your browser — open tabs, bookmarks, and history — from a single overlay.

Press Ctrl+K (Cmd+K on Mac) to open. Start typing and results appear instantly, ranked by frecency (frequency + recency). No server, no account, everything runs locally.

Features:
- Instantly find tabs, bookmarks, and history from one place
- Frecency ranking — recently and frequently visited pages rise to the top
- Ghost text auto-completion from your browsing history
- Prefix filters (t for tabs, b for bookmarks, h for history)
- Custom plugins — filter by URL pattern or open parameterized URLs
- Built-in /compute calculator and /translate (EN↔中文)
- New tab page with launcher auto-focused
- Configurable keyboard shortcut
- Config sync across browsers via remote server (optional)
- Catppuccin Mocha dark theme

Xun is open source, privacy-first, and works entirely offline. No data leaves your browser unless you enable optional config sync.

寻 means "to seek" in Chinese.
Manage and execute custom X search queries with aliases. Supports automatic 'since/until' time ranges via a popup interface.

Summary
Master your X (Twitter) searches with custom aliases and automated time-range filters.

Description
Tired of typing complex search operators every time? X Search History List allows you to save your frequent X search queries as simple "Aliases" and execute them instantly via a dedicated popup or the X search bar.

Whether you are tracking specific topics or monitoring real-time updates, this extension streamlines your workflow by automating advanced search commands.

Key Features
･Search Aliases: Save long, complex queries (e.g., "from:OpenAI include:native_video") with a short name like "AI-Video" and trigger them easily.
･Smart Time-Range (since/until): Automatically appends time filters to your queries to find only the latest tweets since your last search.(e.g., "since:until")
･Focus Mode: Quickly switch to the "Live" (Latest) tab on X by adding a simple command to your saved queries.(e.g., "focus:latest")
･History Integration: Seamlessly manages your search history within X's native interface for a consistent experience.
･Minimalist Popup: A clean, dark-mode-ready interface to manage, add, and delete your search list on the fly.

How to Use
1.Open the extension popup and add your favorite X query with a "Name" (Alias).
2.Type alias:YourName in the X search bar, or use the saved list.
3.The extension automatically expands the alias and executes the full search.

Palet adds a command palette to Chrome — press Ctrl+Shift+Space on any page to instantly search across all your open tabs, bookmarks, and browsing history simultaneously.

No more hunting through 30 tabs. No more digging through bookmark folders. No more slow Chrome history page.

FREE FOREVER — NO ACCOUNT, NO CREDIT CARD
- Unified search — tabs, bookmarks, 7-day history in one place
- Recently closed tabs — find and reopen closed tabs instantly
- Search installed extensions — enable or disable any extension
- Prefix search — type > to filter by type (>tab, >closed, >command)
- Copy URL with Ctrl+C on any result
- Tab management: pin, mute, duplicate, close, move, reload, bookmark
- Browser commands: Settings, History, Downloads, Incognito, Passwords and more
- Help panel — press ? to see all commands and shortcuts
- Keyboard navigation — arrow keys, Enter, Escape
- Hover previews — title and URL on hover

PRO FEATURES — $24 one-time, no subscription
- 90-day history search (Free: 7 days)
- Rich hover previews — visit count, folder, window, last visited date
- Arrow key preview navigation
- Advanced prefix search: >bookmark, >history, >alias, >extension
- Time filters: >today, >yesterday, >lastweek, >lastmonth
- Tab filters: >pinned, >audio, >duplicate, >unread
- Domain filter: >domain:github.com
- Multi-tab select — Ctrl+Click tabs, then bulk close
- Custom aliases — type "gm" to open Gmail
- Math + unit + live currency conversion inline
- Custom keyboard shortcut
- Export data as JSON / CSV

PRIVACY
Palet stores everything locally in your browser. Zero network requests during normal use. No account required. No data collection. No tracking. Ever.

FREE tier is free forever — no time limit, no credit card needed.
14-day Pro trial included automatically. After the trial, Palet continues working with all Free features. Upgrade to Pro for $24 one-time to keep Pro features forever.
Privacy-first productivity tracker. Track web usage, visualize trends, and enforce local usage limits—100% offline.

🌟 Zenith — Your Personal Productivity Intelligence

Reclaim your focus and master your time with Zenith, a beautiful, privacy-first productivity tracker that works 100% offline. Zenith helps you understand your digital habits, visualize your true screen time, and regain control over distracting websites.

Are you losing hours to endless scrolling? Zenith doesn't just block sites—it gives you deep, actionable insights into how you spend your day, empowering you to make intentional choices about your time.

🔥 KEY FEATURES
📊 Deep Flow Analytics & Dashboards Get a stunning, high-level overview of your daily internet usage. Zenith categorizes your browsing into intuitive segments (Work, Dev, Entertainment, Social, etc.) and visualizes your data with beautiful charts and heatmaps. Spot your long-term productivity patterns at a glance.

🛡️ Custom Site Limits & Soft Blocking Set daily time goals and limits for your most distracting websites (like YouTube, Twitter, or Reddit). Once your time is up, Zenith gently intervenes with a gorgeous "Goal Reached" overlay. Need a little extra time to finish up? Use the "5 Min Grace" period, or close the tab to move on with your day.

👻 Ghost Mode Need to do some research you don't want tracked? Toggle "Ghost Mode" directly from the popup. Zenith will temporarily pause tracking without needing to navigate complex settings.

🕵️ Tab Auditor See exactly what's open right now. Zenith’s Tab Auditor helps you identify memory hogs and distracting tabs that you might have forgotten about, allowing you to quickly clean up your workspace.

⚡ Instant Insights Popup Check your top sites, category breakdown, and total active screen time for the day instantly from the extension popup. No need to open a full dashboard just to see how you are doing.

🔒 100% Offline & Private Your data belongs to you. Zenith processes everything locally on your machine. Absolutely no browsing data, history, or telemetry is ever sent to the cloud. What happens in your browser stays in your browser.

✨ WHY ZENITH?
• Beautifully Designed: A modern, dark-mode first interface that feels like a native macOS app. No more clunky, outdated graphs. • No Account Required: Install and start tracking instantly. No sign-ups, no subscriptions, no tracking pixels. • Lightweight: Built with performance in mind. Zenith quietly runs in the background using minimal resources, ensuring your browsing remains lightning fast. • Actionable: Don't just track time—enforce boundaries that help you build healthier digital habits.

🚀 HOW IT WORKS
Install: Add Zenith to Chrome in seconds.
Browse: Go about your day normally. Zenith automatically tracks active time and categorizes your visits.
Analyze: Open the dashboard to uncover trends and identify time sinks.
Enforce: Set targeted daily limits for distracting sites.
Thrive: Regain hours of productive time every week.
Stop wondering where your day went. Install Zenith today and start making every minute count.

Note: Zenith requires permission to read your active tabs and history strictly to calculate local usage statistics. No data is ever transmitted off your device.

Navigate Your Digital World Faster with HotPath

Welcome to HotPath, the ultimate Chrome extension designed to revolutionize how you interact with the web. Say goodbye to the endless scrolling through bookmarks and history. HotPath elegantly simplifies your browsing experience, making it faster, more intuitive, and incredibly efficient.

Quick Access to Your Favorite Sites
HotPath intelligently tracks your most visited websites, creating a dynamic list of your top destinations - your 'HotPaths'. With a simple and intuitive interface, you're just a click or a hotkey away (Cmd+Shift+H) from your favorite sites. Whether it's news, social media, work tools, or just your favorite blog, HotPath keeps them at your fingertips.

Effortless Browsing History Navigation
Ever tried to find that one website you visited days ago but can't quite remember the name? HotPath has got you covered. With an easy-to-access list of your last 100 visited sites, retracing your digital steps has never been easier. Dive back into your browsing history with a simple, user-friendly interface that takes the hassle out of searching through your browser history.

Streamlined, User-Friendly Experience
We believe in keeping things simple and efficient. That’s why HotPath boasts a clean, clutter-free interface that's a breeze to navigate. Its lightweight design means it won't slow down your browser, giving you a smooth and responsive user experience every time. You never have to leave the page you are currently on.

Secure
Your browsing habits are unique, and HotPath respects that. Nothing is sent over the net- your history belongs to you.
Silently cleans history and specific content.

Ever panicked when someone walked into the room while you were browsing? Sneaky Browser is the ultimate privacy tool designed to instantly hide what you're looking at and automatically erase the evidence from your device.(you know what we're talking about ;))

A standard "Incognito Window" is obvious to anyone looking over your shoulder. Sneaky Browser works silently right in your normal browser workspace, disguised as a normal tab, ensuring you maintain perfect plausible deniability.

FREE FEATURES: 🛡️ Instant Wipe Shortcut: Press Ctrl+Shift+X to instantly eradicate your most recent sensitive browsing history with zero lag.

🔥 UNLOCK PRO FOR COMPLETE AUTOMATION 🔥 Why risk forgetting to clear your history? Upgrade to Pro and let the extension do the paranoid work for you!

✅ Auto-Wipe Engine: The extension silently scans in the background. If you visit a sensitive site (you know what we're talking about ;)), it gets instantly wiped from your local history logs the exact second it loads. ✅ Panic Close (Right-Click): Someone walking by? Just hold Right-Click for half a second. The tab is instantly destroyed and replaced with a safe "Fallback URL" (like Wikipedia). ✅ Session Corruption: We intercept your browser's memory. Even if someone presses "Ctrl+Shift+T" to reopen your closed tabs, they'll only get your safe Fallback URL!

Take control of your privacy permanently. No data collection. Pure local privacy.

Track subscriptions and free trials. Get reminders before you're charged. No bank access required.

Never get surprised by a subscription charge again.

SubGuard helps you track all your subscriptions and free trials in one place, right from your browser toolbar. Get notified before renewals hit and before free trials expire — so you can cancel what you don't need.

HOW IT WORKS
• Add subscriptions manually or let SubGuard find them by scanning your browsing history
• Optionally connect Gmail to discover subscription receipts and billing emails
• View your total monthly spending at a glance
• Get browser notifications 3 days before any renewal or trial expiration

KEY FEATURES
• Smart Reminders — Never miss a renewal or trial deadline
• History Scan — Automatically finds subscription sites in your browsing history
• Gmail Scan — Discovers subscriptions from your email receipts (optional)
• Monthly Dashboard — See all your subscriptions and total spend
• Price Change Alerts — Get notified when a subscription price changes
• Cancel Links — Quick access to cancellation pages
• CSV Export — Download your subscription data anytime
• Category Tracking — Organize by streaming, music, productivity, and more

PRIVACY FIRST
• All data stays in your browser — nothing is sent to any server
• Zero bank or financial account access
• Gmail scanning reads email metadata and short previews — never full email bodies
• You can disconnect Gmail accounts at any time
• No analytics, no tracking, no third-party data sharing

Free tier tracks up to 5 subscriptions with full reminder support. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited tracking, auto-detection, and advanced features.
Track how often you visit subscription sites and see the real cost per use.

You pay for streaming services, creative tools, AI assistants, and productivity apps. But how often do you actually open them?

CostPerClick tracks your browser visits to subscription websites and calculates the real cost per use — so you can see which subscriptions are worth keeping and which are silently draining your money.

HOW IT WORKS
Add your subscriptions (name, monthly cost, website). CostPerClick silently tracks visits. Open the dashboard to see your cost-per-use for each service, colour-coded from great value to cancel candidate.

FEATURES
Cost-per-use dashboard — see exactly what each visit costs you
Colour-coded tiers — ranked from great value to unused
Quick-add popular services with one tap
Unused subscription alerts — notified when you haven't visited in 14+ days
Monthly trends — see your usage patterns over time
CSV export — download your data as a spreadsheet
Multi-domain tracking — track services that span multiple websites
Dark mode — follows your system preference automatically
Keyboard shortcut — Cmd+Shift+K (Mac) / Ctrl+Shift+K (Windows)
Right-click any website to add it as a subscription instantly

PRIVACY FIRST
All data stays on your device. No account needed. No cloud. No analytics. No tracking. The only external connections are Google's favicon API (for site icons) and ExtensionPay (for Pro purchases).

FREE & PRO
Free: Track up to 5 subscriptions with all features.
Pro (£4.99 one-time): Unlimited subscriptions. Not a subscription — because that would be ironic.

Local-first browsing analytics + one-click tab organizer for Chrome. Replace your new tab, see where your hours actually go.

See where your time actually goes online.

SiteLogs is a Chrome extension that quietly records how long you spend
on each website — locally, on your machine. Replaces your new tab with
a personal dashboard, organizes 47 stale tabs in one click, and never
sends a byte anywhere.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✦ What it does
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⏱ Honest time tracking — counts active focus minutes, pauses on idle.
   Not "tab open duration". Per-URL, per-domain, per-category.

🏠 Custom new tab dashboard — every new tab opens your personal stats,
   pinned shortcuts, hot sites, and the 24×7 heatmap. No Google search
   bar, no sponsored links.

📌 Pin frequently-used sites — one-click access from the new tab.

🗂 One-click tab cleanup — close duplicate URLs, group remaining tabs
   by domain into Chrome's native colored tab groups. Save the current
   window as a named Session, restore it later.

📈 Period-over-period analysis — today vs your average Tuesday, this
   week vs last week, new domains vs lapsed.

🎯 Focus blocks (≥10 min continuous reading) auto-detected. Daily
   focus budgets per category with progress bars.

🏷 Tags + custom rules — 200+ entry built-in dictionary maps domains
   to 13 categories; override with your own domain or regex rules.

🌏 EN / 中文 — fully bilingual, switch in Settings.

100% local-first. Your browsing data lives in your browser's IndexedDB
on this device — never uploaded, never indexed by anyone else. We have
no server. We can't see what you visit, even subpoenaed.

The only outbound calls are Google Fonts CSS (will self-host) and
license-key activation when you pay.

No telemetry. No analytics. No external tracking. No login required.
